languages.text: "Боюсь, что вам придется принять статус-кво, уважаемый коллега". {n}Эоганн даже не пытается скрыть доброжелательное ехидство в голосе.{/n} "Благодарю за единомыслие, Вольный Торговец. Я немедленно продолжу начатый труд по внедрению формулы в остальных сервиторов".

"I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."
languages.original_text: "Боюсь, что вам придется принять статус-кво, уважаемый коллега". {n}Эоганн даже не пытается скрыть доброжелательное ехидство в голосе.{/n} "Благодарю за единомыслие, Вольный Торговец. Я немедленно продолжу начатый труд по внедрению формулы в остальных сервиторов".

traits.locale_text: "I am afraid you shall have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your concurrence, Rogue Trader. I shall immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

"I am afraid you shall have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your concurrence, Rogue Trader. I shall immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

"I am afraid you shall have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I shall immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

"I am afraid you shall have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I shall immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

"I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

"I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

languages.text: "Ich fürchte, Ihr werdet den Status quo akzeptieren müssen, geschätzter Kollege." {n}Eogunn bemüht sich nicht, die Selbstgefälligkeit in seiner Stimme zu verbergen.{/n} "Danke für Eure Zustimmung, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde umgehend damit fortfahren, die Formel in die verbliebenen Servitoren zu implementieren."
languages.original_text: "I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

traits.locale_text: "Ich fürchte, Ihr werdet den Status quo akzeptieren müssen, geschätzter Kollege." {n}Eogunn bemüht sich nicht, die Selbstgefälligkeit in seiner Stimme zu verbergen.{/n} "Danke für Eure Zustimmung, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde umgehend damit fortfahren, die Formel in die verbliebenen Servitoren zu implementieren."

languages.text: « Je crains que tu n'aies d'autre choix que de te résigner, mon estimé collègue. » {n}Eogunn n'essaie même pas de dissimuler la suffisance qui transparaît dans sa voix.{/n} « Merci pour votre assentiment, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je vais immédiatement reprendre mes travaux et tâcher d'implémenter ma formule chez les servitors restants. »
languages.original_text: "I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

traits.locale_text: « Je crains que tu n'aies d'autre choix que de te résigner, mon estimé collègue. » {n}Eogunn n'essaie même pas de dissimuler la suffisance qui transparaît dans sa voix.{/n} « Merci pour votre assentiment, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je vais immédiatement reprendre mes travaux et tâcher d'implémenter ma formule chez les servitors restants. »

languages.text: “恐怕你只能接受现实了，我尊敬的同僚。”{n}伊奥贡毫不掩饰语气中的得意。{/n}“感谢您的认可，行商浪人。我会立即复工，将公式应用于其余机仆。”
languages.original_text: "I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

traits.locale_text: “恐怕你只能接受现实了，我尊敬的同僚。”{n}伊奥贡毫不掩饰语气中的得意。{/n}“感谢您的认可，行商浪人。我会立即复工，将公式应用于其余机仆。”

languages.text: «Me temo que tendrá que aceptar el status quo, estimado colega». {n}Eogunn ni siquiera intenta camuflar la soberbia de su voz.{/n} «Gracias por su aprobación, Comerciante Independiente. Reanudaré inmediatamente mi labor de implementar la fórmula en los servidores restantes».
languages.original_text: "I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

traits.locale_text: «Me temo que tendrá que aceptar el status quo, estimado colega». {n}Eogunn ni siquiera intenta camuflar la soberbia de su voz.{/n} «Gracias por su aprobación, Comerciante Independiente. Reanudaré inmediatamente mi labor de implementar la fórmula en los servidores restantes».

languages.text: 「残念ながら、現状を受け入れるしかないようだ、尊敬する同僚よ」{n}エオガンは、その声に含まれる自惚れを隠そうともしない。{/n}「同意してくれてありがとう、ローグ・トレーダー。早速、残りのサーヴァイターに処方を導入する作業を再開しよう」
languages.original_text: "I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

traits.locale_text: 「残念ながら、現状を受け入れるしかないようだ、尊敬する同僚よ」{n}エオガンは、その声に含まれる自惚れを隠そうともしない。{/n}「同意してくれてありがとう、ローグ・トレーダー。早速、残りのサーヴァイターに処方を導入する作業を再開しよう」

languages.text: "Korkarım statükoyu kabul etmen gerekecek saygıdeğer meslektaşım." {n}Eogunn, sesindeki kendini beğenmişliği gizlemek için hiçbir çaba göstermiyor.{/n} "Anlaşma için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir. Kalan hizmetörlerde formülü uygulama işime derhâl devam edeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I am afraid you will have to accept the status quo, esteemed colleague." {n}Eogunn makes no effort to conceal the smugness in his voice.{/n} "Thank you for your agreement, Rogue Trader. I will immediately resume my work of implementing the formula in the remaining servitors."

traits.locale_text: "Korkarım statükoyu kabul etmen gerekecek saygıdeğer meslektaşım." {n}Eogunn, sesindeki kendini beğenmişliği gizlemek için hiçbir çaba göstermiyor.{/n} "Anlaşma için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir. Kalan hizmetörlerde formülü uygulama işime derhâl devam edeceğim."
